scripts.lint: npm run lint -w packages/worker && npm run lint -w packages/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/worker && npm run typecheck -w packages/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/worker && npm run test -w packages/web && npm run test:e2e -w packages/web
scripts.dev: concurrently -n worker,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w packages/worker" "npm run dev -w packages/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/worker && npm run build -w packages/web
